sourcePrompt: A narrow Vietnamese urban shophouse of Saigon or Da Nang, French-colonial in flavor: about four meters wide but two tall stories, made for a tight street. An open shopfront at street level under a horizontal signboard, tall shuttered windows and a small railed balcony above, stucco walls with simple cornice lines, and a shallow clay-tile roof. Faded pastel stucco - mint or ochre - weathered and characterful.
